name: Elgi Rubber Company Limited
summary: Elgi Rubber Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells reclaimed rubber, retreading machinery, and retread rubber in India and internationally. It offers tire retread and repair systems under the Jet brand name; rasp blades, hubs, and spacers under the Pincott brand name; brazed carbide tools under the Carbrasive brand name; gums, adhesives, and sealants under the Midwest Rubber brand name; reclaimed rubber under the Ecorr brand name; and tire and tube repair products under the Westernweld name. The company also provides expandable rims and hubs under the CRS brand name; and retread process equipment under the Armonas brand name. Elgi Rubber Company Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Coimbatore, India.
